patch.value:
# Capability: Security & code scanning (living backlog)

Owns repository security posture work that previously had no capability home:
- Semgrep Code finding triage batches (first import: pm-oz8u, 40 findings from 2026-07-06 CSV — 6 High spawn-shell-true, 34 Medium prototype-pollution/non-literal-RegExp/dependabot-cooldown).
- Dependabot dependency hygiene (pm-2czc closed the 2026-07-06 unblock: @types/node 26, pnpm cooldown, codeql-action lockstep group).
- Secret guardrails and history-redact usage policy (see 2026-05-22 history-repair learning: never quote secret-pattern literals into pm text).
- Future CodeQL / scanner integrations.

Convention: each scanner import creates one batch Task parented here, with one Issue per platform finding (Semgrep ID as issue code) so findings stay individually triageable. Sibling epic pm-92if owns CodeFactor (maintainability) findings; this epic owns security-class findings.

Living backlog capability epic for repository security posture: Semgrep Code finding triage, spawn/shell and RegExp injection hardening, dependabot hygiene, CodeQL, secret guardrails. Created in ecosystem audit #12 after the 2026-07-06 Semgrep import (pm-oz8u, 40 findings) and the dependabot chore pm-2czc had no fitting capability epic. Duplicate check: pm search 'security code scanning' / epic list — no existing security epic.

All code-scanning findings (Semgrep/CodeQL/dependabot/secrets) are tracked as pm issues under this epic with source links and triage state; recurring scanner imports parent their batch tasks here; epic stays OPEN as a living backlog even at 0 open children.

Living backlog capability epic for repository security posture: Semgrep Code finding triage, spawn/shell and RegExp injection hardening, dependabot hygiene, CodeQL, secret guardrails. Created in ecosystem review #12 after the 2026-07-06 Semgrep import (pm-oz8u, 40 findings) and the dependabot chore pm-2czc had no fitting capability epic. Duplicate check: pm search 'security code scanning' / epic list — no existing security epic.

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Live GitHub security/dependency sweep 2026-07-13: Dependabot alert API contains 39 fixed and 0 open alerts; code-scanning contains 10 fixed and 0 open alerts; secret-scanning contains 0 alerts; pnpm audit reports 0 vulnerabilities at every severity. Five dependency-update PRs are open and remain isolated for their own review: #537 dev-dependencies group, #538 @sentry/node 10.64.0, #539 TypeScript 7.0.2, #540 @types/node 26.1.1, #541 eslint-plugin-unicorn 71.1.0. No duplicate pm item created and none were claimed in this context implementation lane.

value.author: codex-gpt5
value.text: Live GitHub security/dependency sweep 2026-07-14: Dependabot, code-scanning, and secret-scanning APIs each return zero open alerts; pnpm audit --audit-level high reports no known vulnerabilities. Open dependency PRs are #552 grouped dev dependencies, #541 eslint-plugin-unicorn 71.1.0, #540 @types/node 26.1.1, #539 TypeScript 7.0.2, and #538 @sentry/node 10.65.0. They remain isolated/unclaimed for their own compatibility review.

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Live GitHub security/dependency reconciliation 2026-07-14 22:00 CEST: Dependabot, code-scanning, and secret-scanning APIs each report 0 open alerts. Open dependency PRs remain isolated and unclaimed: #552 and #541 are fully green; #538 is fully green; #539 TypeScript 7.0.2 fails static, coverage-shard, and Windows compatibility gates; #540 @types/node 26.1.1 fails build/docs and is incompatible with the repository's Node >=22.18 declaration contract already decided in pm-2a9n. No duplicate security or dependency item created by this SDK lane.

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Live GitHub security/dependency reconciliation 2026-07-15: Dependabot and secret-scanning report 0 open alerts; pnpm audit reports 0 vulnerabilities at all severities. Scorecard SARIF now exposes 7 open code-scanning findings (Fuzzing, CII-Best-Practices, Security-Policy, Code-Review, and 3 Token-Permissions instances), all already represented by pm-gnzh and its child tasks, so no duplicates created. Dependency PRs #552/#541/#538 are green; #539 remains incompatible/failing static+coverage+Windows; #540 remains incompatible/failing build+docs.

value.author: codex-sdk-vcs-20260718
value.text: Live GitHub reconciliation 2026-07-18: 0 open PRs, 0 open Dependabot alerts, and 0 secret-scanning alerts. Code scanning has exactly 7 open OSSF Scorecard alerts (Fuzzing, CI Best Practices, Security Policy, Code Review, and three Token Permissions), matching the live open pm-gnzh program and its dedicated children; no duplicate security items created. Open GitHub issues were rechecked; newly unmapped GH-585 and GH-586 were captured as open/unclaimed pm-v1yo and pm-um4g. This SDK lane does not claim or implement those findings.

value.author: codex-sdk-vcs-20260718
value.text: Dependency audit supplement 2026-07-18: pnpm audit reports 0 info/low/moderate/high/critical vulnerabilities across 341 dependencies. Together with 0 open Dependabot and secret alerts, no dependency remediation belongs in this PR.

value.author: codex-gpt5
value.text: GitHub security sweep 2026-07-18 for PR #593: Dependabot open alerts=0, secret-scanning open alerts=0, npm audit reports no known vulnerabilities, and seven open code-scanning rows are OpenSSF Scorecard program signals already canonicalized by pm-003j, pm-obq2, pm-2d7k, pm-rrt1, and pm-0yi7. No duplicate security work created.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: GitHub evidence 2026-07-19: newest main CI/CodeQL/Security/Docs/Scorecard runs at e9492d71 are green; Dependabot open alerts=0; secret-scanning open alerts=0; seven open Scorecard code-scanning alerts map to existing canonical items pm-0yi7, pm-rrt1, pm-2d7k, pm-obq2, and pm-003j under pm-gnzh. No duplicate security item created.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: PR #616 first review round: all GitHub runner gates green. Reacted to every bot top-level comment, review, and inline thread. Accepted seven actionable threads (three duplicate false-AC-mutation reports consolidated) and validated fixes with 212 focused tests, lint with zero clones/warnings, and 5,963 tests at exact 100/100/100/100 coverage.
